name: doc-extract
description: Auto-extract text and images from PDF, DOCX, XLSX into .temp/ on Read. No external apps — pure JS.
author: Claude Code Plugin

commands.name: extract-doc
commands.description: Extract content from a document into .temp/<filename>/ as markdown with embedded images

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Path to PDF, DOCX, or XLSX file

commands.name: doc-extracted
commands.description: Check if a document has been extracted and return path to extracted data
